description:
Geni makes learning fun for kids ages 5-10! With daily missions combining math exercises and guided reading, children build essential skills while having a blast.

FEATURES:
• Daily learning missions — complete math and reading activities each day to earn rewards
• Math exercises — 20 exercises per chapter covering addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division
• Guided reading — three modes: read by myself, read to me, and hear me read with speech recognition
• Smart difficulty — activities adapt to your child's age and skill level automatically
• Fun rewards — earn stars, coins, XP, and unlock badges as you progress
• Multiple profiles — support for siblings, each with their own progress tracking
• Parent dashboard — track progress, manage profiles, and customize settings with PIN protection
• Choose operations — pick which math operations to practice, with age-based recommendations
• Cloud sync — sync progress across devices with a simple code
• Bilingual — full support for English and Norwegian

Designed with a playful, kid-friendly interface that children love to use. No ads, no in-app purchases — just pure learning fun.
whatsNew:
Personalize your learning adventure with three beautiful themes — Standard, Ocean, and Blossom! Each profile can pick their own style with a live preview.

New
• Themes — choose Standard, Ocean, or Blossom for each profile, with live background preview
• Advanced exercises for ages 9-10 with structured topic progression
• Visual exercises for ages 5-8 covering counting, comparing, and number sequences
• Age-smart reading — adapts reading requirements based on your child's age
• "How many?" counting exercises with fun visuals
• Compact avatar picker for quicker profile setup

Improved
• Celebration effects when earning badges
• Clearer question text for compare, match, and sequence exercises

Fixed
• Resolved a crash when resuming exercises
• Themes now persist correctly across the app
